title: Guerrero
overview: The murder of three communist professionals in March 1985, was one of the crimes with the biggest impact on the public eye during the Chilean dictatorship. Manuel Guerrero Ceballos was one of the victims and that day the life of his son Manuel changes forever.

trailers.title: Adelanto de "Guerrero", el nuevo documental de Sebastián Moreno
